mapper.select: select ps.playlist_id as playlistId, s.id as songId, s.name as songName, a.name as artistName, s.album as album, s.duration as duration, s.style as style, s.cover_url as coverUrl, s.audio_url as audioUrl from tb_playlist_song ps left join tb_song s on ps.song_id = s.id left join tb_artist a on s.artist_id = a.id where ps.playlist_id = #{playlistId}
